subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath appeared is verily the Hidden Secret in the knowledge of God and the Symbol [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ظهر انه هو السر المستور فی علم الله و الرمز
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @suffering and imprisonment
